text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka continues preparing for the Yayoi
Sho as winter grows colder. One day, Special
Week asks her to train together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka happily obliges. Seeing how hard
Special Week works to improve makes her realize
that other Umamusume run because they want to
fulfill their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This discovery unsettles her, and she begins to
doubt her reasons for running.
